description: Canadian outlaw biker gang and support club for the Hells Angels, founded in Montreal on March 26, 1992 by Maurice 'Mom' Boucher. Active until 2001, it served as a recruitment tool and enforcement arm for the Hells Angels during the Quebec Biker War, carrying out intimidation, assaults, and assassinations to control the illegal drug trade.

country_links.context: The Rockers MC was founded in Montreal, Quebec, Canada, and its territory was practically exclusive to Quebec with some reported activity in North British Columbia.
